title: Cinematic and Web Funnel Engine — intake/known-context.json (Skill 62, U9)
description: The caller-supplied known-client-context object intake_engine.py was started with, plus the confirm/decline log for every question it short-circuited (spec Section 8: 'Reuse known client context and request confirmation instead of re-asking known facts'). A question is never silently auto-filled from known_context — it is always routed through one explicit yes/no confirmation question first, recorded here.
